title: Python simulator: align CCP-16, TDMA, load balancing, CBOR signaling, test vector validation with spec/02a
description: Update python/src/lichen/sim/ (tdma.py, node.py, medium.py) and test runners to exactly match spec tables for thresholds, density/load_factor/EMA metrics, adaptive SF, desync recovery. Ensure all ccp*.json vectors pass with independent oracles. Fix any signaling/CBOR mismatches.
